_meta.method: cross-referenced changelog, git log, plan objectives, and filesystem

0-cleanup.goal: Remove thin wrapper delegation layer in apps/quotation/ and relocate premature quotation assembly out of packages/
0-cleanup.blocking_reason: Deferred because quotation flow was assembled before its constituent components (catalog, basket) were individually built and verified. Still the case today.

todo.item: Delete apps/quotation/state/AppStateMachine.js
Delete apps/quotation/components/HomePage.js
Delete apps/quotation/components/ClientSelector.js
Update test imports to reference packages/ directly (appStateMachine.test.js, home.test.js, clientSelector.test.js)
Move apps/quotation/components/ClientSelector.html to packages/components/quotation/modals/ClientSelector.html
Move packages/components/quotation/ to apps/quotation/pkg/ — packages/ should contain only individually-verified components
Verify no file imports from old packages/components/quotation/ path

0-cleanup.unblock_condition: Can be done at any time — independent of I-3. Recommended before phase 05 wires the full quotation UI.

I-1-database.goal: Verified seed, edit operations, validation rules, and interactive DB browser playground

done.item: seed.js with real DB field names for all tables
DB browser playground (read-only, table navigation, column sort, tag filters)
All 11 tables loaded and browsable (including transactional tables with 0 rows)

todo.item: Wire editService into playground: double-click cell → inline edit → Enter commits / Escape cancels
todo.note: editService.js is written but not called from the playground

todo.item: Wire validation into playground: invalid input shows red outline + tooltip, blocks save
todo.note: validation.js is written but not called from the playground

todo.item: Add 'Add row' button in toolbar: appends blank row, enters edit mode on first required field, saves/cancels cleanly
Add playground tests for inline-edit and add-row flows

I-1-database.unblock_condition: Independent — can be done at any time. Prerequisite for III-1-resolver.

III-1-resolver.goal: Read-only resolver panel in the DB viewer: select an item from ITEM_CATALOGO, see its fully-resolved definition (inherited profile, pricing rules, computed defaults)
III-1-resolver.prerequisite: I-1-database must be complete (inline edit + add row wired)

todo.item: Add resolverItemId and resolvedItem fields to databaseMachine context
Add SELECT_RESOLVER_ITEM transition to databaseMachine (browsing → browsing, updates resolvedItem context)
Wire resolver dropdown in playground: selecting ITEM_CATALOGO row fires SELECT_RESOLVER_ITEM
Render resolver panel (visible when resolvedItem !== null): inheritance chain, pricing profile, applicable rules
Add tests for SELECT_RESOLVER_ITEM transition and resolvedItem context shape

III-1-resolver.unblock_condition: Unblocked after I-1-database playground edits are wired (inline-edit + add-row). Can be deferred since resolveItemDefinition() already works — this is a debug/diagnostic UI feature.

done: Item.fromDefinition() accepts real DB shape from resolveItemDefinition()
Playground with real seed item selector (no manual price sliders)
UI visibility flags from category dimension flags (showPax, showCantidad, showDuracion, showHora)
Category-profile inheritance and item-level override both working
Dead files removed (ItemComponent.js, ItemComponent.html, RulesEditor.html, orphaned docs)
PERFILES_INICIALIZACION table added to Config_Schema.js + CSV seed
resolveItemDefinition upgraded to 5-way join (item + categoria + perfil + perfilInit + reglas)

I-3-category.note: All phase logic exists in working tree. Branch fix/i3-from-step-01 is fixing a regression in step-01 before the full set can be committed. Steps 02-04 artifacts are untracked in git.

01_category_loader.open_issue: Branch fix/i3-from-step-01 indicates a teardown/regression bug found after commit. Fix in progress.

todo: Commit after phase-01 fix is resolved
Commit after phase-01 fix and phase-02 commit

todo.item: Map every control/gesture in html_playground_draft.html to its target orchestrator event and expected state impact. Produce a strict matrix used as implementation checklist.
1. Shell + panel regions layout
todo.constraint: No business logic in Alpine — only event dispatch and projection binding

todo.item: 2. Read-only projection binding to existing toDisplayObject() shapes
3. Interaction wiring: buttons, selectors, drag/drop mapped to existing container commands (ship, override, clear, move, replicate day)
4. Timeline/scheduler gestures mapped to entry/day operations
Add Playwright E2E tests: catalog-to-basket shipping, override behavior, day operations, full UI interactions

constraints: Must consume existing shared templates/adapters — no duplication of item card HTML or DB mapping helpers
Do not modify item domain functions or item machine contract
No direct business-state mutation in Alpine
05_full_planned_ui_integration.unblock_condition: Phases 01-04 committed and all tests green

_immediate_priorities.action: Resolve fix/i3-from-step-01 — fix the phase-01 teardown regression, then commit phases 02-04 in sequence
I-1 playground edit wiring — connect editService.js and validation.js to the DB browser UI
I-3 phase 05 — full planned UI integration over the now-stable catalog/basket/basket-day contracts
III-1-resolver panel — wire SELECT_RESOLVER_ITEM into DB playground
0-cleanup — remove thin wrapper layer in apps/quotation/, move quotation assembly to apps/quotation/pkg/
_immediate_priorities.unblocks: clean package boundaries for future GAS bundling
